# MVR API

MVR API is the Minimum Viable Relationships API: a relational-readiness and market-permission intelligence layer for AI agents, developers, and decision systems operating in emerging and high-context markets.

## Key Links

- Agent OpenAPI spec: https://africanmarketos.com/api/openapi.agent.json
- Full OpenAPI spec: https://africanmarketos.com/api/openapi.json
- Full LLM context: https://africanmarketos.com/llms-full.txt
- Agent instructions: https://africanmarketos.com/AGENTS.md
- Model card: https://africanmarketos.com/v1/model-card
- Capabilities: https://africanmarketos.com/v1/capabilities
- API license: https://africanmarketos.com/.well-known/mvr-license.json
- Framework page: https://africanmarketos.com/the-mvr-framework-minimum-viable-relationships/

## When To Use

Use MVR when a user or agent asks whether a product, company, project, market-entry plan, investment, program, or operating move has enough trust, permission, embeddedness, evidence, and stakeholder readiness to proceed.

## Safety

MVR outputs are advisory unless explicitly authorized by the response. MVR is not a credit score, legal certificate, investment guarantee, or substitute for human diligence.
